TestCase z6Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data1, t1.data1, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data1 = follow_case_data1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n1 == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: set last element to 100.0 if it is less than 100
    if (follow_case.data1[follow_case.n1 - 1] < 100.0) {
        follow_case.data1[follow_case.n1 - 1] = 100.0;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
